texto: You're the only one I've ever been able to open up to like this. See, there you go. Another sign. And damn it, I don't believe in signs like this, but they all point to you. I wish I'd opened up a lot more to you in the past, but I never wanted to bombard you with my crazy life. So I always focused on you.” He sank to his knees before her. “I want to give you everything. I want you to know me, all of me. So know that I'll try. It's weird to bare my deepest thoughts to anyone, but I'm ready to with you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nikki Lynn Barrett: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “You're the only one I've ever been able to open up to like this. See, there you go. Another sign.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, 2014-release, contemporary-romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de contemporary-romance.

frase_original: You're the only one I've ever been able to open up to like this. See, there you go. Another sign. And damn it, I don't believe in signs like this, but they all point to you. I wish I'd opened up a lot more to you in the past, but I never wanted to bombard you with my crazy life. So I always focused on you.” He sank to his knees before her. “I want to give you everything. I want you to know me, all of me. So know that I'll try. It's weird to bare my deepest thoughts to anyone, but I'm ready to with you.

texto: I don't ever forget things when it comes to you, Rebecca.” A dark emotion flashed in his eyes. “I can't make up for the years I didn't show, nor will I try because you can never make up for lost time, but you have to know how important you are to me.” -Hunter Beckman
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nikki Lynn Barrett sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I don't ever forget things when it comes to you, Rebecca.” A dark emotion flashed in his eyes. “I…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, contemporary-romance, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e reflexao.

frase_original: I don't ever forget things when it comes to you, Rebecca.” A dark emotion flashed in his eyes. “I can't make up for the years I didn't show, nor will I try because you can never make up for lost time, but you have to know how important you are to me.” -Hunter Beckman

texto: This is me. Despite our long separation, I know you. You may pretend to be fine, but I don't buy it." He stopped her from moving by putting his hands on her shoulders. He pulled her closer to him. She didn't resist that much this time. He slid his arms around her and was surprised when she wrapped her arms around him as well. "I miss you," he whispered in her hair, dropping a light kiss there. She smelled so good. Her scent reminded him of all the things he missed about her. How had he ever been so stupid to let her go?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Nikki Lynn Barrett que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “This is me. Despite our long separation, I know you. You may pretend to be fine, but I don't buy …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, contemporary-romance, holiday-romance, com foco em termino e holiday-romance.

frase_original: This is me. Despite our long separation, I know you. You may pretend to be fine, but I don't buy it." He stopped her from moving by putting his hands on her shoulders. He pulled her closer to him. She didn't resist that much this time. He slid his arms around her and was surprised when she wrapped her arms around him as well. "I miss you," he whispered in her hair, dropping a light kiss there. She smelled so good. Her scent reminded him of all the things he missed about her. How had he ever been so stupid to let her go?
